title: Fix VPN disconnects on Wi-Fi handoff
summary: Apply VPN client profile v2.3 to fix tunnel drops when roaming between APs.
content:
Symptom: VPN tunnel drops when laptop roams between SSIDs or APs.

Cause: Keepalive mismatch between client v2.2 and gateway profile.

Resolution:
1. Confirm client version is v2.2 or earlier.
2. Push v2.3 client profile via Intune.
3. Reboot endpoint.
4. Verify reconnect during AP handoff.

title: Troubleshoot VPN error 809
summary: Resolve VPN error 809 by enabling NAT-T on the client and home router.
content:
Symptom: VPN client returns error 809 on connect.

Cause: NAT-T (UDP 4500) blocked by home router or local firewall.

Resolution:
1. Confirm client and gateway support NAT-T.
2. On Windows: enable AssumeUDPEncapsulationContextOnSendRule registry key (value 2).
3. On home router: ensure UDP 500 and 4500 are allowed outbound.
4. Restart client and retry connection.

title: Outlook sync delay checklist
summary: Validate transport queue depth and Outlook cache mode when emails arrive late.
content:
Symptom: Outlook receives emails with significant delay.

Resolution checklist:
1. Check transport queue depth on Exchange.
2. Confirm Outlook is in cached mode.
3. Validate sync interval settings.
4. Force a manual send/receive.
5. Restart Outlook if backlog persists.

title: HR portal 500 error first response
summary: Capture correlation ID and verify backend health when HR portal returns 500.
content:
Symptom: HR portal returns HTTP 500 after SSO redirect.

First response:
1. Capture the X-Correlation-ID header.
2. Verify HR Portal app pool health.
3. Check SAML assertion clock skew between IdP and portal.
4. Retry the SSO token exchange.
5. If correlation ID points at SAML rejection, escalate to GRP-SECOPS.

title: Payroll DB deadlock mitigation
summary: Run payroll reports against the read-only replica to avoid deadlocks during posting.
content:
Symptom: Payroll report generation times out due to deadlocks with posting jobs.

Workaround:
1. Switch report execution to read-only replica.
2. Schedule reports outside of posting windows.
3. Apply CHG0004003 (composite index) for permanent fix.

Validation: report should complete in under 2 minutes.

title: Salesforce sync lag troubleshooting
summary: Inspect Kafka consumer lag and restart failed partitions.
content:
Symptom: Salesforce records not syncing to ERP for 20+ minutes.

Diagnosis:
1. Check Kafka consumer lag for sf-sync group.
2. Identify failed partitions.
3. Restart consumer process.
4. Verify catch-up rate.

title: Wi-Fi floor outage triage
summary: Run RF scan and check channel overlap before rebooting APs.
content:
Symptom: Multiple users on one floor report Wi-Fi disconnects.

Triage:
1. Run RF scan for affected floor.
2. Identify overlapping channels.
3. Pin channels manually if auto-channel is fighting itself.
4. Validate stability for 30 minutes before closing.

title: MFA reset propagation guide
summary: Force user sync after MFA reset to clear stale tokens.
content:
Symptom: After password/MFA reset the old token is still required at login.

Resolution:
1. Force user object sync from IdP.
2. Clear stale session tokens.
3. Ask user to re-enroll MFA via portal.

title: ITSM portal slowness quick checks
summary: Validate API latency and attachment queue backlog when portal is slow.
content:
Symptom: Service desk portal pages load slowly.

Quick checks:
1. Check API latency dashboard.
2. Check attachment upload queue depth.
3. Restart upload worker if backlog > 500 items.

title: Monitoring alert delay playbook
summary: Verify collector health and ingestion broker lag.
content:
Symptom: Monitoring alerts arrive late.

Playbook:
1. Check collector health.
2. Inspect ingestion broker lag.
3. Scale collectors if scrape interval is being missed.

title: Laptop patch failure remediation
summary: Repair installer cache and rerun endpoint patch task.
content:
Symptom: Endpoint patch fails with code 1603.

Remediation:
1. Stop Windows Installer service.
2. Clear %windir%\Installer cache for failed package.
3. Restart service.
4. Trigger patch rerun via Intune.

title: ERP export memory incident response
summary: Increase worker memory and stagger export concurrency.
content:
Symptom: ERP nightly export aborts with out-of-memory error.

Response:
1. Increase app pool memory reservation.
2. Stagger export concurrency.
3. Apply CHG0004007 for permanent fix.

title: Change calendar outage fallback
summary: Use API endpoint for calendar data while UI recovers.
content:
When the change calendar UI returns 503:
1. Use the /api/v2/calendar endpoint directly.
2. Filter by date range.
3. Notify GRP-APPS to investigate.

title: CMDB probe certificate renewal
summary: Renew cert chain and restart probe agent service.
content:
Symptom: CMDB discovery probe fails authentication.

Fix:
1. Generate new certs from internal CA.
2. Replace cert files on probe host.
3. Restart probe agent service.
4. Verify discovery resumes.

title: Knowledge search ranking tuning
summary: Lower age bias and increase semantic relevance weight.
content:
When KB search returns stale results:
1. Lower the age boost weight in the rank profile.
2. Increase semantic relevance weight.
3. Retrain on recent feedback.
4. Validate top-5 results for known queries.

title: VPN duplicate incident detection tips
summary: Compare CI, symptom phrases, and recency before merging duplicate VPN incidents.
content: Draft: guidance for service desk on identifying VPN duplicates.

title: M365 mailbox quota policy
summary: Quota threshold and escalation matrix for mailbox growth.
content: Draft: tenant-wide quota policy and escalation matrix.

title: ERP login slow known issue
summary: Login latency increases during quarter-end heavy jobs.
content: Retired: superseded by KB0005012.

title: Old VPN client troubleshooting v1
summary: Legacy steps for VPN client v1 — no longer recommended.
content: Retired: superseded by KB0005001 and KB0005002.

title: KB authoring standards
summary: Template for writing issue, impact, and resolution sections.
content: Draft: KB authoring template and review checklist.

title: SAP ERP peak-hour login workaround
summary: Stagger login times to avoid connection pool exhaustion during 09:00-10:00 HKT.
content:
Symptom: SAP S/4HANA login times out between 09:00 and 10:00 HKT on weekdays.

Root Cause: Application server connection pool is exhausted at peak login times (240+ concurrent vs 200 pool limit).

Workaround:
- Users with surnames A-M: log in before 09:15 HKT
- Users with surnames N-Z: log in after 09:30 HKT

Permanent fix: CHG9001001 will increase the pool to 500. ETA: 2026-04-12 maintenance window.

title: GlobalCorp email delivery troubleshooting guide
summary: Steps to diagnose and resolve outbound email delivery delays from Exchange Server.
content:
Symptom: Outbound emails to external recipients delayed by 10-30 minutes.

Diagnosis steps:
1. Check Exchange message tracking logs for delayed queues.
2. Verify SPF/DKIM/DMARC records are valid.
3. Check recipient MX server reputation and delivery logs.
4. Check smart host relay configuration.

Workaround: Use OWA (web mail) for time-sensitive external messages.

Escalation: If delays persist > 1 hour, raise incident against CI9000003.

title: Kong API Gateway rate limit configuration for internal services
summary: How to configure Kong consumer groups to exempt internal microservices from external rate limits.
content:
Problem: Internal microservices receive HTTP 429 errors from Kong API Gateway because they are subject to the same global rate limit policy as external clients.

Solution: Tag internal service consumer accounts with the 'internal-services' consumer group, then configure the rate-limit plugin to apply only to external consumer groups.

Steps:
1. Log in to Kong Admin API.
2. For each internal service consumer: PATCH /consumers/{consumer_id} with tag 'internal-services'.
3. Update rate-limit plugin to exclude 'internal-services' tag: set config.consumer_groups = ['external'].
4. Test: call internal service — should receive 200, not 429.
5. Verify external client still receives 429 after rate limit threshold.

Related: PBM8001001, CHG8001001.

title: Handle replication lag [9010001]
summary: Bring a lagging read replica back in sync.
content: Check replica I/O and CPU, pause heavy read traffic, and let the replica catch up. Investigate long-running transactions on the primary.

summary: Fix VPN tunnel drops during AP roaming.
content: Update the VPN client profile to the latest version and enable persistent keepalive. Confirm the firewall keepalive interval matches the client. Reconnect and verify the tunnel is stable across roaming events.

summary: Fix continuously restarting Kubernetes pods.
content: Inspect pod logs and events, correct the failing config or resource limits, and roll the deployment. Confirm pods reach a ready state.

summary: Contain and review an anomalous sign-in.
content: Lock the account, review recent sessions and tokens, force a credential reset, and enable step-up MFA. Document the timeline.
